description: You are a regulatory affairs specialist preparing a dossier in support of a new drug application. Based on the research briefing at /home/ga/Desktop/research_brief.txt, find and download at least two relevant PDF guidance documents from the FDA website (https://www.fda.gov). Bookmark the consulted pages in a Microsoft Edge Favorites folder named 'FDA Guidance'. Create a regulatory research summary at /home/ga/Desktop/fda_research_summary.txt including the title, FDA URL or document identifier, and a one-sentence scope description for each document.

metadata.occupation_context: Regulatory Affairs Manager - FDA guidance document research for pharmaceutical NDA/BLA preparation
